name: the-dhammapada
description: Valerie J. Roebuck's translation of 'The Dhammapada' — the most widely read Buddhist scripture, a collection of the Buddha's sayings in verse. 26 chapters covering the twin verses, mind, awareness, fools, the wise, anger, craving, the path, and the monk. A foundational text of Buddhist philosophy and practice, translated for Penguin Classics.
